regions.description: List of distinct visual regions identified in the timetable.

type.description: The category of the region. There can be multiple regions of the same type (e.g., two time_grids).

top.description: Distance from the top of the image to the top edge of the box (0-1000).

left.description: Distance from the left of the image to the left edge of the box (0-1000).

bottom.description: Distance from the top of the image to the bottom edge of the box (0-1000).

right.description: Distance from the left of the image to the right edge of the box (0-1000).

text_sample.description: A short, exact text snippet read from inside this region.

description.description: Description of the region if type is 'other'. Otherwise, use an empty string.
